profile.loginPrompt: Sign in to access your account

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: CasaFix connects you with verified local artisans in minutes. Here's how it works:

step1.title: Choose a service
step1.desc: Select the type of repair you need: plumbing, electrical, locksmith, and more.

step2.title: Describe the problem
step2.desc: Take photos and describe the issue. Our AI will provide a preliminary diagnosis.

step3.title: Secure pre-authorisation
step3.desc: Your card is pre-authorised (NOT charged). Only the final price will be debited.

step4.title: Track your artisan
step4.desc: See your artisan on the map in real-time as they head to your location.

step5.title: Confirm arrival
step5.desc: Show the QR code to the artisan when they arrive to confirm their presence.

step6.title: Work is done
step6.desc: The artisan does the job and proposes the final price. You accept or decline.

step7.title: Secure payment
step7.desc: Only the agreed price is charged. You have 48h to validate the work.

step8.title: Rate your artisan
step8.desc: Leave a review to help other clients and reward good work.

howItWorks.tip1: Your money is safe — only a pre-authorisation, no charge until you accept.
howItWorks.tip2: Free cancellation within the first 2 minutes.
howItWorks.tip3: All artisans are verified and insured.

article1.title: Article 1 – Purpose
article1.content: These Terms and Conditions (hereinafter "T&C") govern the use of the CasaFix mobile application (hereinafter "the Application"), published by BENJAMIN TAIEB, auto-entrepreneur (sole proprietor). The Application is a platform connecting homeowners seeking home repair and maintenance services with verified artisans (SIRET, Kbis, professional liability insurance) operating in France. CasaFix acts as a technical intermediary and is not the direct provider of services.

article2.title: Article 2 – Registration and access
article2.content: Access to the Application is free. Registration is available via email, Apple Sign-In or Google Sign-In. Users agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information and to maintain the confidentiality of their login credentials. The Application is available in 13 languages.

article3.title: Article 3 – Services offered
article3.content: CasaFix connects users with verified artisans for: plumbing, electrical, locksmith, heating, AC, pest control, appliances, glazing, small works, renovation, pool and garden services. Users can book an emergency or scheduled appointment. An AI-powered photo diagnostic (Claude Vision) is available to help identify the issue. CasaFix is not the direct service provider and acts as a technical intermediary.

article4.title: Article 4 – Booking and payment
article4.content: Upon booking, the estimated maximum amount is pre-authorised on the customer's bank card via Stripe. No charge is made until the work is completed. After the intervention, the artisan proposes the final price. The customer has 48 hours to confirm or dispute the amount. Only the validated final amount is charged. The difference between the pre-authorised and final amounts is automatically released. An invoice is sent by email. Displayed prices are indicative ranges including VAT. No surcharge is applied for evenings, weekends or public holidays.

article5.title: Article 5 – Cancellation
article5.content: The customer may cancel free of charge within 2 minutes of booking confirmation. After this period, a displacement fee of €75 is owed to the artisan. This amount covers the artisan's actual travel costs and is not a penalty. In accordance with Article L. 221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to fully performed emergency service contracts.

article6.title: Article 6 – No-show protection
article6.content: If the artisan does not arrive within 45 minutes of the agreed time, the customer is automatically refunded. The artisan's arrival is confirmed via a QR code system. Real-time GPS tracking allows the customer to follow the artisan en route.

article7.title: Article 7 – Reviews and ratings
article7.content: After each intervention, both the customer and the artisan are invited to leave a reciprocal review. Reviews are mandatory and contribute to network quality. Fraudulent or abusive reviews may be moderated by CasaFix.

article8.title: Article 8 – Disputes and mediation
article8.content: In case of a dispute, the customer can report a problem directly from the Application. The CasaFix team reviews each report within 24 hours. Mediation between the customer and artisan is offered. A full or partial refund may be granted depending on the circumstances. In accordance with Articles L. 611-1 et seq. of the French Consumer Code, the customer may use a consumer mediator free of charge.

article9.title: Article 9 – Liability
article9.content: CasaFix acts as a technical intermediary within the meaning of the French LCEN (Law on Confidence in the Digital Economy). CasaFix is not directly responsible for the quality of work performed by artisans, though CasaFix commits to verifying their qualifications (SIRET, Kbis, professional liability insurance). The user acknowledges that CasaFix cannot guarantee permanent availability of the Application or the absence of technical errors. Partner artisans are independent professionals.

article10.title: Article 10 – Personal data and GDPR
article10.content: CasaFix complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act (Loi Informatique et Libertés). Data collected is used solely for service operation and is never shared with third parties without consent. Data is hosted on servers located in the European Union (Supabase). For more details, see our Privacy Policy.

article11.title: Article 11 – Applicable law and jurisdiction
article11.content: These T&C are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the interpretation or performance of these T&C shall be submitted to the competent French courts, in accordance with the provisions of the Consumer Code and the Code of Civil Procedure.

article12.title: Article 12 – Amendment of Terms
article12.content: CasaFix reserves the right to modify these T&C at any time. Amendments take effect upon publication in the Application. Users are encouraged to review the T&C regularly. Continued use of the Application after amendments constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

legalNotice.publisherContent:
CasaFix
Publisher: BENJAMIN TAIEB, auto-entrepreneur (sole proprietor)
Home repair and maintenance services marketplace
France
Contact: contact@casafix.fr
legalNotice.hostingContent: The application and data are hosted by Supabase Inc. on servers located in the European Union, in compliance with the GDPR. Third-party services: Stripe (payments), Firebase (notifications), Anthropic (AI diagnostic via Claude Vision).
legalNotice.ipContent: All CasaFix content (logos, text, images, structure, source code) is protected by French and European intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, without the express written authorisation of CasaFix is prohibited and constitutes infringement under Articles L. 335-2 et seq. of the French Intellectual Property Code.

privacy.dataContent: CasaFix collects the following personal data: identity (name, surname), email address, phone number, postal address, geolocation data (GPS), photos submitted for AI diagnostic, messages exchanged with artisans, and payment data (processed by Stripe, never stored on our servers). This data is necessary for connecting you with artisans and for the proper operation of the service.
privacy.purposeContent: Your data is used for: connecting customers with verified artisans, payment processing and invoicing, platform security (artisan verification, fraud prevention), GPS tracking of interventions, AI-powered photo diagnostic, sending notifications about your bookings, and continuous service improvement.
privacy.legalBasisContent: The processing of your data is based on: your consent (Article 6.1.a GDPR) for geolocation and photos, and performance of a contract (Article 6.1.b GDPR) for data necessary to provide the service (identity, payment, communications).
privacy.subprocessorsContent: CasaFix uses the following subprocessors: Supabase Inc. (data hosting, EU servers), Stripe Inc. (payment processing, PCI-DSS certified), Firebase / Google (push notifications), Anthropic (Claude Vision, AI photo diagnostic). All subprocessors are bound by contractual obligations compliant with the GDPR.
privacy.cookiesContent: The application uses strictly necessary functional cookies. Analytical cookies may be used to improve the user experience, only with your consent. In accordance with the ePrivacy Directive and CNIL recommendations, you can change your preferences at any time.
privacy.rightsContent: Under the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights: right of access to your data, right to rectification, right to erasure (right to be forgotten), right to data portability, right to object to processing, right to restrict processing. You can exercise these rights at any time by contacting us. You also have the right to file a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés).
privacy.contactContent:
For any questions about your personal data or to exercise your rights, contact us at: contact@casafix.fr

Data controller: BENJAMIN TAIEB, auto-entrepreneur (sole proprietor)
France

paymentSettings.preauthDesc: Only the final amount is charged after the service. The rest is automatically released

help.faq1a: When booking, the maximum amount is pre-authorised on your card. After the service, only the final price set by the artisan is charged. The difference is automatically released.
help.faq2a: Once a booking is confirmed, a €75 displacement fee applies. You may however decline the work and only pay the displacement fee. This system prevents cancellation abuse while leaving you the choice.
help.faq3a: All services are covered by a 1-year guarantee on parts and labour. If you have an issue, contact us.
help.faq4q: How do I report a problem?
help.faq4a: From your booking page, you can report a problem. Our team will review your case within 24 hours.
help.faq5a: All artisans are verified, insured for professional liability, and hold the required qualifications.
